Risk Description: Data sharing from BBSRI at risk
Mitigating Action: facilitate conversations with Umaine on data sharing

Risk Description: Ice data collection unsuccessful
Mitigating Action: real time data collection implemented

Risk Description: Appropriate permits and licenses procured in time for open water testing
Mitigating Action: FERC Final license application submittal scheduled for 12/17

Risk Description: Wet Gap Generator design not yet complete
Mitigating Action: Design reviews and component validation testing

Risk Description: Timing of generator procurement from IKM could be tight for schedule
Mitigating Action: Ensure Generator delivery by 2/2018 to allow adequate time for testing using project development plan with regular status reports

Risk Description: Components are not available
Mitigating Action: Compile BOM and ascertain component lead times from vendors in advance of PO issue

Risk Description: Structural Assembly: fabricated components have significant lead times
Mitigating Action: Frequent vendor communication , issue PO with room for schedule creep, Rapid change order resolution, contractual penalties for schedule slip

Risk Description: Turbine: fabricated components have significant lead times
Mitigating Action: Frequent vendor communication , issue PO with room for schedule creep, Rapid change order resolution, contractual penalties for schedule slip

Risk Description: Singel source vendor for some components that require design completion and fabrication
Mitigating Action: Frequent vendor communication , issue PO with room for schedule creep, Rapid change order resolution, contractual penalties for schedule slip

Risk Description: SCADA components are not available, integration of components and software is delayed
Mitigating Action: Compile BOM and ascertain component lead times from vendors in advance of PO issue

Risk Description: Power Cables: fabrication delays and out of spec delivered product
Mitigating Action: Compile BOM and ascertain component lead times from vendors in advance of PO issue

Risk Description: Mooring System: components are not available
Mitigating Action: Compile BOM and ascertain component lead times from vendors in advance of PO issue

Risk Description: Driveline procurement: custom components require fabrication lead time
Mitigating Action: Frequent vendor communication , issue PO with room for schedule creep, Rapid change order resolution, contractual penalties for schedule slip or incorrect product delivery

Risk Description: Mechanical brake: custom components require fabrication lead time
Mitigating Action: Frequent vendor communication , issue PO with room for schedule creep, Rapid change order resolution, contractual penalties for schedule slip or incorrect product delivery

Risk Description: Buoyancy System fails some or all of validation tests
Mitigating Action: Utilizing Incremental improvements to a proven concept, add redundancy to design Perform land based tests in May 2017 and move on to on water validation tests prior to shipment to Igiugig

Risk Description: Structural Assembly fails some or all of validation tests
Mitigating Action: FEA analysis of structure include load factors following DNV standards and considers extreme loading conditions such as uneven bottom and detailed CAD models for subsystem interfaces validation tests to ensure structural integrity meets specs incorporate structural redundancy

Risk Description: Turbine Assembly fails some or all of validation tests
Mitigating Action: Utilize CFD as design tool for performance validation, FEA analysis of turbines include load factors following DNV standards and considers extreme loading conditions, secondary design input from composite manufacturer

Risk Description: Generator fails some or all of validation tests
Mitigating Action: Factory Acceptance testing and laboratory testing of Generator integrated with Power electronics to ensure compatibility

Risk Description: Power Electronics fails validation
Mitigating Action: Factory acceptance tests and sequenced laboratory testing to ensure Power Electronics meets requirements before shipment

Risk Description: SCADA system fails validation
Mitigating Action: Factory acceptance tests and sequenced laboratory testing to ensure SCADA meets requirements before shipment

Risk Description: Power and data cables failure
Mitigating Action: Utilize proven cable technology utilize secondary cable armor in high risk areas utilize redundant conductors for data and fiber optic, reduce inspections and associated wear and tear

Risk Description: Mooring system failure
Mitigating Action: Design to DNV standards, utilize geophysical knowledge and seek industry expertise to specify mooring system components, consider most favorable failure modes

Risk Description: Driveline failure
Mitigating Action: Through validation testing, design system for increased operational tolerances and loads, choose components with long service life and minimal maintenance and alignment requirements increase modularity for replacement

Risk Description: Mechanical Brake Failure
Mitigating Action: Through validation testing, redundant electrical brake, Rely on third party expertise for design

Risk Description: Receipt of FERC Pilot license or permits are delayed and compromise deployment
Mitigating Action: Continue regular dialogue with regulatory agencies after final pilot license and other permit applications, respond to AIRs in timely manner

Risk Description: Component shipment to Igiugig is delayed due to schedule slip, transportation contractor issues, weather or other
Mitigating Action: Track project schedule, align component validation and delivery to port of shipment with shipper schedules, ship components early if possible arrival on first barge of season (June 2018) or second (Jluy 2018) at latest

Risk Description: Device assembly difficult or requires modification in Igiugig
Mitigating Action: Device assembly is difficult or requires workaround in Igiugig due to component interfaces, component damage during shipment, or other. Timing June-August 2018

Risk Description: Power System deployment/commissioning encounters unexpected difficulties
Mitigating Action: prior device testing and component testing in Nikiski and elsewhere will reduce unexpected issues with deployment or commissioning. These validation steps completed by May 2018

Risk Description: Ice accumulation on or interaction with device causes power disruption, reduction, or equipment damage
Mitigating Action: Collection of in river ice data for 2 years prior to deployment feeds engineering and IO&M planning, June 2017- June 2018. ON device ice monitoring allows for operational state modification if adverse conditions or interactions occur

Risk Description: Salmon smolt data collection shows adverse reaction, or inadequate data collection does not provide regulatory agencies with adequate information to allow operation or testing during salmon smolt outmigration
Mitigating Action: Develop rigorous fish monitoring plan in budget period 2. Consults with state and federal agencies regularly to ensure study plan and instrumentation provides adequate information for decision making, operate device only under continuous monitoring during smolt outmigration

Risk Description: Device removal complicated by technological or environmental factors
Mitigating Action: Buoyancy system includes redundant and isolated retrieval mechanisms, pre testing In Nikiski to reduce risk of retrieval issues arising

Risk Description: Higher cost for maintenance and logistical support required for final design and operations plan, including training and personnel requirements, external equipment and spares.
Mitigating Action: Developing system requirements will be critical for determining technical scope for operations and maintenance technical support; involve local resources and include 3rd party input to accurately ascertain feasibility of proposed systems for logistical and technical requirements in remote environment. Develop trained leads during project who will be responsible for operating the systems after the project.
